overview.description: The Even Herd Long Short ETF (EHLS) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in long/short alternatives. The fund is an actively managed fund that employs a momentum-based proprietary algorithm to take long and short positions in US equity securities. EHLS was launched on Apr 1, 2024 and is issued by Even Herd.
